title: dysoxylum oliveri
intro: Dysoxylum oliveri, also known as the Philippine Dysoxylum, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Meliaceae, native to the Philippines. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and terpenoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum oliveri include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the bark is prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cases, it is also used to make a herbal infusion or tincture for medicinal purposes.
